title: Aslan´s Cataclysm
description: Upgraded Version of Ignitium Ingot.Requires L Ender's Cataclysm,Aslan's Cataclysm adds a new Ingot with Tools, Smithing Template and an Enchantment.(not my work)
body:
![Main text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f13a57281040f197410527ef5c2e8b36cba2bba4.png)

Upgraded Version of Ignitium Ingot.

Requires L Ender's Cataclysm!

Aslan's Cataclysm adds a new Ingot with Tools, Smithing Template and an Enchantment.
Not my work, original page:
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aslans-cataclysm


Enchantment:
Charged:

When struck by lightning, holding tools with the Charged Enchantment deal more damage on the next hit. (stacks)
New Damage = Old Damage + 0.5 * Enchantment Level     (probably getting readjusted later)
